content:
# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 21, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development focused on authentication stability and UI refinement. Key achievements include implementing server-side session refreshing to resolve silent logout issues and updating wallet login styling.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Authentication and Session Management**
*   Integrated wallet and GitHub login with server-side session refreshing to resolve the 15-30 minute silent-logout bug ([#463](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/463)).

**UI/UX Refinements**
*   Bumped `@stwd/react` to 0.7.2 to fix text wrapping and inconsistent button styling for EVM/Solana wallet connections ([#464](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/464)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#465](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/465): fix(login): native Ethereum + Solana buttons (match Google/Discord).

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Project Proposals and Feature Requests**
*   [#6977](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/6977): Closed the Merxex Integration Proposal regarding agent commerce.
*   [#7007](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/7007): Closed the feature request for a PII sanitization layer before LLM processing.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
